# hetzner_traffic (Data Source)

Query traffic statistics for Hetzner IP addresses and subnets.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `from` (String) Start date/time. Format depends on type: day=YYYY-MM-DDTHH, month=YYYY-MM-DD, year=YYYY-MM.
- `to` (String) End date/time. Format depends on type: day=YYYY-MM-DDTHH, month=YYYY-MM-DD, year=YYYY-MM.
- `type` (String) Query type: "day", "month", or "year".

### Optional

- `ips` (List of String) List of IP addresses to query traffic for.
- `single_values` (Boolean) Whether to return grouped data.
- `subnets` (List of String) List of subnet IPs to query traffic for.

### Read-Only

- `data` (Attributes List) Aggregated traffic data per IP/subnet. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Read-Only:

- `in` (Number) Inbound traffic in GB.
- `ip` (String) The IP address or subnet.
- `out` (Number) Outbound traffic in GB.
- `sum` (Number) Total traffic in GB.
